changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_rule_set_to_rule_set() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO rule_set (rule_set_id, rule_expression_id, study_event_definition_id, crf_id, crf_version_id, study_id, run_schedule, run_time, status_id, owner_id, date_created, date_updated, update_id, version) VALUES (NEW.rule_set_id, NEW.rule_expression_id, NEW.study_event_definition_id, NEW.crf_id, NEW.crf_version_id, NEW.study_id, NEW.run_schedule, NEW.run_time, NEW.status_id, NEW.owner_id, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.update_id, NEW.version); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE rule_set SET rule_expression_id=NEW.rule_expression_id, study_event_definition_id=NEW.study_event_definition_id, crf_id=NEW.crf_id, crf_version_id=NEW.crf_version_id, study_id=NEW.study_id, run_schedule=NEW.run_schedule, run_time=NEW.run_time, status_id=NEW.status_id, owner_id=NEW.owner_id, date_created=NEW.date_created, date_updated=NEW.date_updated, update_id=NEW.update_id, version=NEW.version WHERE rule_set_id=OLD.rule_set_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM rule_set WHERE rule_set_id=OLD.rule_set_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql; CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_module_rule_set AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON module_rule_set FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_module_rule_set_to_rule_set();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_module_rule_set ON module_rule_set; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_module_rule_set_to_rule_set();
